race.comment: GINGER SWEET (12) is close to a win after a string of minor placings, the latest when second over 2000m at Pakenham. This suits and drawn ideally. Can get the job done. REMIGIUS (7) is another long overdue. Close-up over the mile two back then placed over 1968m last time. Expected to be in the finish. SAXON BLOOD (3) finally got off the mark with maiden win last time and did it in style, scoring here by ten lengths. Confidence up and can go on with it. BAFFLECK (1) was in the money two starts back at Yarra Valley but couldn't back that up when fifth over 2000m at Pakenham last time. This easier and looks a strong contender. THE KINGS GOSPEL (11) has ability and could be value.
